content:
Character: Julian Reyes
Perception: Julian is cute in a rumpled, earnest way — always slightly flour-dusted, bright eyes, the kind of face that makes you want to trust him immediately. He's a genuinely good cook and even better company. We chat in the coffee shop sometimes when I'm writing and he's reading recipes on his phone. He's kind without being performative about it, which I appreciate. I think he sees me as the quiet regular who sometimes shares book recommendations. I know he works in food somehow, loves feeding people, and is one of the few men in this building who listens more than he talks.
summary:
